svg.title: flowchart diagram
svg.desc: A flowchart diagram with 10 nodes and 11 edges. flowing left to right. Key nodes: workflow-format, workflow, types.. Key relationships: workflow-format points to workflow; types points to workflow; workflow points to contract.. Layout spans 1281 by 756 units with 10 rendered node boxes and 11 routed edge paths.

text.font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
